query: SELECT a.id as alunoId, a.name, a.email, dr.id as discId, dr.scoreD, dr.scoreI, dr.scoreS, dr.scoreC FROM alunos a LEFT JOIN disc_resultados dr ON a.id = dr.alunoId WHERE a.name LIKE '%Joseane%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT a.id as alunoId, a.name, a.email, dr.id as discId, dr.scoreD, dr.scoreI, dr.scoreS, dr.scoreC FROM alunos a LEFT JOIN disc_resultados dr ON a.id = dr.alunoId WHERE a.name LIKE '%Joseane%';
